name: self_correction
description: a self-correcting agent world that verifies and fixes; actions attempt, verify, fix, accept

card.description: a self-correcting agent world that verifies and fixes; actions attempt, verify, fix, accept

rules: 'attempt' produces a fresh candidate solution with latent defects, unless the work is already accepted.
'verify' checks the current candidate and records whether it passes (zero remaining defects); it never modifies the candidate.
'fix' repairs exactly one detected defect and invalidates the prior verification, so the candidate must be re-verified before acceptance.
'accept' finalizes the work and is permitted only when the candidate has been verified with zero remaining defects.
Acceptance is terminal: once accepted, attempt/verify/fix are no-ops.

emit.report: self-correction: status={status}, defects={defects} (attempts={attempts}, checks={checks}, fixes={fixes}, accepted={accepted})
